name: Manual Multi-Class Phenotyping
description: You are a researcher preparing a ground-truth dataset for a cell classification model. Using Fiji (ImageJ), manually classify objects in the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image into two categories: 'Round' and 'Elongated'. Mark at least 5 'Round' objects and at least 5 'Elongated' objects using distinct counters. Export the coordinates (X, Y) and counter/type information for all marked points to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/manual_counts.csv'.
